mapper.sql: select c.chute_id, c.chute_name, c.chute_code, c.chute_height, c.location, c.dept_id, d.dept_name, c.status, c.del_flag, c.create_by, c.create_time, c.update_by, c.update_time, c.remark from device_chute c left join sys_dept d on d.dept_id = c.dept_id
mapper.insert: insert into device_chute(chute_name, chute_code, chute_height, location, dept_id, status, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark) values(#{chuteName}, #{chuteCode}, #{chuteHeight}, #{location}, #{deptId}, #{status}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.update:
update device_chute set del_flag = '2' where chute_id in
#{chuteId}
